title: Host Hotels: Ready To Accommodate Long-Term Portfolios
text: Host Hotels & Resorts is the largest lodging REIT and one of the largest owners of luxury and upper-upscale hotels. The company has rebounded from the worst effects of the COVID-19 pandemic to levels near those last seen in 2019. In some measures, they have even surpassed 2019.

title: 6 REITs to Sell Now
text: These are 6 REITs to sell now. They are not worth investing in as they have little or no income or they cannot afford their distributions, which REITs are required to make if they have income.

title: 3 Equity REIT Stocks Poised to Gain From the Industry Rebound
text: With the healthy fundamentals of the digital economy, migration trends, easing of restrictions and improving lodging industry fundamentals and favorable demographic trends, Prologis, Inc. (PLD), Extra Space Storage Inc. (EXR) and Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (HST) are likely to benefit.

title: Barclays Is Betting Big on These 7 REITs
text: Rising interest rates have drastically pushed down markets among other things but one asset class that tends to survive rate increases and inflationary times is real estate investment trusts, or REITs.
